chunks.content:
Article: Ask Anno
[]: Ask Anno             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Aug 16, 2006 4:35 pm if you could ask Anno one question what would you ask him?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Aug 16, 2006 4:45 pm That last scene in EoE was just one more mind-fuck for the road right?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Wed Aug 16, 2006 4:47 pm "Truthfully, did you enjoy directing Evangelion or Cutey Honey more?"

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Aug 16, 2006 4:50 pm "What is it with you and vaginas?"

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Aug 16, 2006 5:05 pm Space Penis wrote: "What is it with you and vaginas?"

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Aug 16, 2006 5:29 pm "Ten years later, do you have any regrets?"

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 16, 2006 7:09 pm Hello, will you please bear my children?

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Thu Aug 17, 2006 10:44 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Hello, will you please bear my children?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Aug 17, 2006 11:30 am "Excuse me, can you tell me what time is it?" :P Or "Are you and idiot?" :P Seriously: "Why did you create Evangelion?"

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Aug 17, 2006 11:36 am *looks three threads down* Did Asuka slit her wrists, or not? *or* Why does the 4th angel look like a penis? Who's penis was it modeled after?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Aug 17, 2006 11:47 am Timstuff wrote: *looks three threads down* Did Asuka slit her wrists, or not? *or* Why does the 4th angel look like a penis? Who's penis was it modeled

Article: Ask Anno
, 2006 11:47 am Timstuff wrote: *looks three threads down* Did Asuka slit her wrists, or not? *or* Why does the 4th angel look like a penis? Who's penis was it modeled after?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Aug 17, 2006 11:56 am I can't list all the questions I would want to ask him. Most of it would be a lot of those really nerdy questions like "Does LCL become a gas during activation?" and "Does Asuka actually die in End of Evangelion before Instrumentality?" and "Why did they strip Ritsuko when she was presented to Seele?". A lot of those functionality type questions that really need to be laid to rest. I wouldn't bother asking anything like "What did Gendo say to Ritsuko in End of Eva?" or anything like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Aug 17, 2006 11:59 am The Eva Monkey wrote: "Why did they strip Ritsuko when she was presented to Seele?".

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Thu Aug 17, 2006 12:09 pm Yeah, cyborgs just wouldn't do it for me if I was Keel.

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Thu Aug 17, 2006 12:11 pm "For the love of God, can you please direct ELAM?! Pretty please!!"

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Aug 17, 2006 12:22 pm AuthenticM wrote: "For the love of God, can you please direct ELAM?! Pretty please!!"

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Thu Aug 17, 2006 12:28 pm Sound it out.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Thu Aug 17, 2006 1:11 pm Space Penis wrote: "What is it with you and vaginas?"

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Thu Aug 17, 2006 2:07 pm If seriously: "Why do 15 SEELE members talk to Kaworu in Director's Cut?" If not: "Is Pen-Pen engaged in a sexual relationship with Asuka\Misato

Article: Ask Anno
 17, 2006 2:07 pm If seriously: "Why do 15 SEELE members talk to Kaworu in Director's Cut?" If not: "Is Pen-Pen engaged in a sexual relationship with Asuka\Misato\Rei\Shinji\All of the above?"

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Thu Aug 17, 2006 3:02 pm Well, if anyone has a penis like that, I don't envy that guy...
